---
bibliography: refs.bib
---

[RnaG shows](https://www.rte.ie/radio/rnag/shows/)

[Íbíotsa](https://soundcloud.com/cois-life-teoranta/01-b-otsa_dl-thph-irt-ocht-na?in=cois-life-teoranta/sets/ibiotsa)

[Teanga Submissions](https://journal.iraal.ie/index.php/teanga/about/submissions),
[Special edition](https://www.gaois.ie/en/blog/gairm-ar-phaipeir-eagran-speisialta-teanga-faoin-teangeolaiocht-chorpais) ---
30 June 2026


## [Fotheidil: an Automatic Transcription System for the Irish Language](https://aclanthology.org/2025.cltw-1.4/) [@lonergan-etal-2025-fotheidil]
- Kaldi DNN-HMM system
- Data:
  - 41.4h (Syn) -- Abair TTS data
  - 17.3h (MG) -- MíleGlór
  - 259.7h (CC) -- Corpas na Cainte Beo + Comhrá
  - 36.6h audiobooks
  - ? (CCh) -- [Caint Chonamara](https://www.sksk.de/index.php/de/veroeffentlichungen-2/materialien/33-caint-chonamara)
  - ? (BBhÁ) -- [Bailiúchán Béaloidis Árann](https://bba.duchas.ie/en/about/bba)
